parsed.answer: Permission modes: (1) Default mode - dangerous tools require approval, (2) Auto-approve / bypass permissions mode - all tool calls auto-approved, (3) Plan/dry-run mode where actions described but not executed. Session-level allowances also available.

claims.statement: There is a default mode where dangerous tools require approval
There is a bypass permissions or equivalent flag that bypasses all approvals
Users can grant session-level approval for a tool from within the dialog
There may be a plan/dry-run mode where actions are described but not executed
